Boot SPI Controller

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x51800000
Size:
0x44
Source:
bootspi_rf.rdl

Description

SPI flash controller used for boot. Controls bus mode, flash commands, DMA, interrupts, and timing parameters for flash operations.

Contents

Offset Identifier Name
0x00 write_status_reg_time Write Status Register Time
0x04 spi_bus_mode SPI Bus Mode
0x08 erase_counter_tap Erase Counter Tap
0x0C dma_en_hclk_status DMA Enable / HCLK Status
0x10 fast_read_control Fast Read Control
0x14 length Length in Bytes for Operation
0x18 spi_flash_command SPI Flash Command
0x1C interrupt_control Interrupt Control
0x20 dma_request_tap DMA Request Tap
0x24 address Base Address for Operation
0x28 page_program_time Page Program Time
0x2C sector_erase_time Sector Erase Time
0x30 small_block_erase_time Small Block Erase Time
0x34 large_block_erase_time Large Block Erase Time
0x38 chip_erase_time Chip Erase Time
0x3C chip_deselect_time Chip Deselect Time
0x40 power_down_time Power Down Time
